name: SANUWAVE Health, Inc.
summary: SANUWAVE Health, Inc. is a medical device company focused on wound care, developing and marketing directed energy products utilizing noninvasive ultrasound technology. Its sole commercial product, UltraMIST, delivers low-frequency, non-thermal ultrasound via a fluid mist to treat acute and chronic wounds including diabetic foot ulcers, venous leg ulcers, and surgical wounds. The company reported $44.1 million in total revenues for the year ended December 31, 2025, a 35% increase from $32.6 million in 2024, with over 1,292 active systems in the field.

products.name: UltraMIST
products.description: FDA-cleared low-frequency non-thermal ultrasound system for non-contact wound healing and debridement; uses single-use sterile applicators; cleared under K140782 with CMS category one reimbursement code 97610.
